productName: Infused Bubble Hash Little Snappers - Strawberry Lemonade - 5pk (5x0.5g)
description: A sativa infused joint built on Strawberrry Lemonade and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of lemon, strawberry, and rose, with a bright, heady lift. A little goes a long way.
